name: offwork-remider
title: Offwork Reminder
description: Show a workday countdown to offwork time and send a reminder when it is time to leave.
author: wang0122xl

commands.name: offwork-remider
commands.title: Offwork Reminder
commands.description: Show today's countdown to offwork time

commands.name: check-offwork
commands.title: 距下班还剩
commands.subtitle: Updates in Root Search
commands.description: Show the latest countdown in Root Search and send the offwork reminder

preferences.name: workStartTime
preferences.title: Work Start Time
preferences.label: Work Start Time
preferences.description: 24-hour time in HH:mm format, for example 09:00.

preferences.name: lunchStartTime
preferences.title: Lunch Start Time
preferences.label: Lunch Start Time
preferences.description: 24-hour time in HH:mm format, for example 12:00.

preferences.name: lunchEndTime
preferences.title: Lunch End Time
preferences.label: Lunch End Time
preferences.description: 24-hour time in HH:mm format, for example 13:00.

preferences.name: offworkTime
preferences.title: Offwork Time
preferences.label: Offwork Time
preferences.description: 24-hour time in HH:mm format, for example 18:30.
